title: scrophularia iranica
intro: Scrophularia iranica is a perennial plant species, belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family, commonly found in Iran and other parts of the Middle East. The medicinal properties of Scrophularia iranica have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoid glycosides, which provide several health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Scrophularia iranica can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
